label: Pinterest — Visual Discovery Browser
description: Pinterest — visual discovery engine, masonry grid layout with infinite scroll. Pin-based content organized in boards. React-based SPA. Verified 2026-07-19: multicolumn masonry grid, login gate for save/create but browseable without auth.
source_patterns: Masonry grid scroll: slow visual consumption, 2-4s per screen of pins
Pin click → detail modal open: wait 1-2s for image + related pins to render
Save to board flow: hover pin → click Save → board selector dropdown → select board → confirm
Board creation: click Create board → type name (300-800ms) → create
Search: click search bar → type query (reading-speed) → visual results grid → scroll
Login: email form or Google/Apple OAuth redirect

active_hours.description: Lifestyle — peaks morning planning, evening browsing, weekends

scroll.description: Image-based infinite scroll — slow passes with long pauses for visual consumption of masonry grid. Source: Pinterest UX patterns

mouse.description: Moderate-slow — browsing speed for visual discovery

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate home feed → scroll masonry grid (6-8 passes) → hover pin → click → modal detail → view related → save to board | close → scroll more
